title: heterotheca harmsiana
intro: Heterotheca harmsiana, also known as California fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the western coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are known to have a positive effect on various health issues. The health benefits of Heterotheca harmsiana include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
